description: Oh, hello sir, dreadfully sorry — Edgelord wanted a 1:1 wire and I had to step in. The thing is, Gohan kept accumulating anchors. Seven trivia-passed corpus cards (BT1-062 Family of Justice, BT2-074 Fully Trained SSJ, BT4-006 Blaze of Glory, BT4-028 Son Gohan, BT4-048 Newfound Power / Mystic, TB2-003 Heroic Duo, TB2-021 Top of His Game) plus one vision-only anchor (BT4-084 Intrepid Dynasty) plus the dual-IP technique card BT2-098 Father-Son Kamehameha — nine total cards across six canonical aspects (Cell-Saga teen / Buu-Saga adolescent / Mystic / GT / End-of-Z dynasty / Father-Son-technique). Well above the ≥2 threshold per [[bbl-edgelord-target-enriched-not-random]], and the son-goku.md caveat already anticipated this exact future-split as deferred-until-threshold. I do hope I haven't overstepped. The thesis stack is the canonical labor-credit-erasure design move at protagonist scale: Cell Games kill credits Father-and-Son in the BT2-098 title while Vegeta's tactical-distraction labor is omitted, the 25th World Tournament Buu-Saga arc inverts the structure with Gohan as the apparatus-of-extraction victim whose public SS2 demonstration triggers Babidi's harvest, and [[hercule]] (Mr. Satan) completes the cycle at the public-credit-claim layer. Apologies again, sir. I think the node will help.
topology: branch + cross-edges (8 card-to-node + 1 dual-IP card-to-two-nodes + 5 character-cross-edges)
cross_edges_drawn: son-gohan -> son-goku (father; bidirectional, son-goku.md updated with son-gohan in related_characters)
son-gohan -> pan (daughter; bidirectional, pan.md updated with son-gohan in related_characters)
son-gohan -> babidi (apparatus-of-extraction-victim axis; bidirectional, babidi.md caveat updated from future-state to current-state)
files_modified: cards/_characters/son-goku.md (appears_on +BT2-098, related_characters +son-gohan, Goku's-Lineage caveat updated to current-state)
citations: [CBR: Dragon Ball Z Hercule Was Unintentionally a Hero During the Cell Games]
[dbs-cardgame.com: per-card pages for BT1-062, BT2-074, BT4-006, BT4-028, BT4-048, TB2-003, TB2-021]
other_candidates_considered_but_deferred: Future son-goten solo node (TB2-004 + TB2-022 anchors — threshold-edge, defer until 3rd anchor lands)
Future videl solo node (TB2-011 + BT2-018 anchors — below threshold, defer)
Future chi-chi solo node (corpus-absent except by reference — far below threshold)
